name: icons-file-types-angular-js
title: Angular Js
description: Angular Js icon from File Types category.

files.content:
import type { FC } from 'react';

import { type IconProps, type SvgProps, sizeMap } from '../types';

export type AngularJSProps = IconProps;

const AngularJSLight: FC<SvgProps> = ({
  size,
  className,
  title,
  role,
  'aria-label': ariaLabel,
  'aria-hidden': ariaHidden,

    viewBox="0 0 16 16"

    aria-label={ariaLabel}
    aria-hidden={ariaHidden}

    <path d="M2.43 10.575 2 3.772l4.574-2.117z" fill="url(#a)" />

      </linearGradient>

        id="g"

        x2="8"
        y2="14.813"
        gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"
      >
        <stop offset=".01" stopColor="#9225F2" />
        <stop offset=".989" stopColor="#F41049" />
      </linearGradient>
      <linearGradient
        id="h"
        x1="2"
        y1="1.655"
        x2="11.047"
        y2="10.703"

);

export const AngularJS: FC<AngularJSProps> = ({
  size = 'md',
  mode = 'light',
  className,
  'aria-label': ariaLabel,
  title,
  ...props
}) => {
  const SvgComponent = mode === 'light' ? AngularJSLight : AngularJSDark;

  return (
    <SvgComponent
      size={sizeMap[size]}
      className={cn('inline-block flex-shrink-0', className)}
      title={title}
      role={ariaLabel ? 'img' : 'presentation'}
      aria-label={ariaLabel}
      aria-hidden={!ariaLabel}
      {...props}
    />
  );
};
